title: isodon inflexus var. verticillatus
intro: Isodon inflexus var. verticillatus, also known as verticillate isodon, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Isodon inflexus var. verticillatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Isodon inflexus var. verticillatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
